scene.message: Maki's Mother: Maki... please,{nl} be safe.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What, do you need{nl} something else?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: I see.{waitkey}Then I'll go look for a way{nl} out of here on my own.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Is everyone feeling{nl} all right?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's chilly here too~{waitkey}I'd really like to say{nl} goodbye to the cold already.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Wonder if they've got{nl} a love potion or something.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I'm glad the infirmary{nl} didn't disappear.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: To find Maki, too, we{nl} must restore the school soon.{waitkey}{ret}
Agastya Tree: Young one...{nl} You have come before me.{waitkey}{ret}
Agastya Tree: Young one...{nl} Go forth with care.{waitkey}{ret}
